mapper.insert: INSERT INTO status(status_no, space_key, status_order, status_title, status_color) VALUES (seq_status_no.nextVal, #{space_key}, #{status_order}, #{status_title}, #{status_color})
mapper.update: UPDATE status SET status_title = #{statusDto.status_title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status_color = #{statusDto.status_color, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE status_no = #{status_no}
UPDATE status SET status_order = status_order + 1 WHERE status_order >= #{new_status_order} AND status_order < #{status_order}
UPDATE status SET status_order = status_order - 1 WHERE status_order <= #{new_status_order} AND status_order > #{status_order}
UPDATE status SET status_order = #{new_status_order} WHERE status_no = #{status_no}
UPDATE task SET status_no = #{new_status_no} WHERE status_no = #{status_no}
UPDATE status SET status_order = status_order - 1 WHERE status_order > (SELECT status_order FROM status WHERE status_no = #{status_no})
mapper.select: SELECT s.status_no, s.status_title, s.status_color FROM status s INNER JOIN color c ON s.status_color = c.color_name WHERE s.space_key = #{space_key} ORDER BY s.status_order ASC
